zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaretha Darmsheimer於大約1530年出生在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根時，她的父親Hans Darmsheimer38歲，母親Catharina21歲。她於1557年與Ansel Kerber在德國爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaretha Darmsheimer于大约1530年出生在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根时，她的父亲Hans Darmsheimer38岁，母亲Catharina21岁。她于1557年与Ansel Kerber在德国爾特波格可萊斯 伯布林根辛德爾分根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaretha Darmsheimer was born about 1530, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Hans Darmsheimer, was 38 and her mother, Catharina, was 21. She married Ansel Kerber in 1557, in Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died after 1590, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaretha Darmsheimer est née environ 1530, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hans Darmsheimer, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Catharina, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ansel Kerber en 1557, à Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1590, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaretha Darmsheimer um 1530 in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Darmsheimer 38 und ihre Mutter Catharina 21. Sie hat 1557 in Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland Ansel Kerber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1590 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Darmsheimer è nata il circa 1530 nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Hans Darmsheimer, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Catharina, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ansel Kerber nel 1557, nel Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1590, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretha Darmsheimerが約1530年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンで生まれた時，父Hans Darmsheimerは38歳，母Catharinaは21歳であった。1557年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンでAnsel Kerberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaretha Darmsheimer(이)가 대략 1530년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Darmsheimer(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catharina(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1557년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐에서 Ansel Kerber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaretha Darmsheimer nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Darmsheimer, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Catharina, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ansel Kerber em 1557, em Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1590, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaretha Darmsheimer родилась около 1530 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Hans Darmsheimer было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharina, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ansel Kerber в 1557 г. в местности синделфинген, крис бoблинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1590 г. в её родном городе.

sm.um 1530–nach 1590: e tusa o le 1530–ina ua ma'ea le 1590

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaretha Darmsheimer nació aproximadamente 1530, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Hans Darmsheimer, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Catharina, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ansel Kerber en 1557, en Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1590, en su pueblo.
